summary: Iteration 2 — full Playwright validation of FinVista case study integration. All 11 review-request flows pass with no console errors and no failed network requests.

finvista_case_study.stat_values: 6 Loan Products | 11 Step Loan Journey | 100+ Components

section_06_design.wireframe_and_exploration_figures: 3 wireframe SVG figures + 3 exploration figures + 17 final screen cards = 23

critical_code_review_comments: FinvistaCaseStudy.jsx hero image src uses pattern `fv.overview && '/finvista/...'` — works because fv.overview is truthy, but the && conditional is misleading. A clearer plain string would be safer.
FinvistaCaseStudy.jsx is ~595 lines — close to the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting per-section components into separate files for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinVista case study fully integrated and working. Key testids: finvista-case-study, section-overview…section-gallery, toggle-gallery (10→47 screens), case-hero-image, coming-soon-case, early-walkthrough-cta, projects-card-, project-card-, nav-{projects,about,services,contact}. All 96 files in /finvista/ public folder serve 200. Total 42 lazy tags from /finvista/ load successfully when scrolled.
